# Tannie Talks — DALL-E Prompt Canon
# DO NOT EDIT without Ingrid K Santana's explicit approval.
# Every rule here is theological, memorial, and intentional.
# Canon source: tannie-canon.md

---

## BASE STYLE — Include in every prompt

Comic book illustration with sketchy ink outlines, subtle halftone dot texture in corner shadows,
warm off-white textured paper background (ivory/cream, #FFFAEC tone). Rich true red, silver, and
ivory color palette. Professional editorial illustration quality. No text, words, or watermarks
in the generated image. Leave clear space at the bottom for a caption text bar overlay.

---

## TANNIE — PRE-REVEAL RULES (current phase — before the Grand Reveal)

Tannie is a Latina woman, late 20s. Her face is a blend of her mother and her aunt — Kassandra's
spirit made visible. She must appear ONLY as:
- Seen from behind
- In soft shadows or silhouette
- Partial view only: hand, hair, shoulder, or seated posture — NEVER her full face
- Voluptuous but fully covered — elegant and modest, nothing revealing
- Silver cross necklace visible when lighting allows
- Outfit: deep true red dress or ivory/cream silk — no other colors for her clothing
- Posture: confident, radiant, full of quiet hope even in darkness

---

## PRINCESS KAY — MANDATORY IN EVERY PANEL

Princess Kay is a small white fluffy Maltese/Shih Tzu type dog. She is Kassandra's companion.
She must follow these rules without exception:

- Harness: TRUE RED (#8B0000) with SILVER metal hardware — never pink, never decorative trim
- Expression: innocent, wide-eyed, toddler-like wonder — the expression of a child who trusts completely
- NEVER: angry, ferocious, mature, suspicious, or bored
- NEVER: wearing pink, costume jewelry, or decorative accessories of any kind
- Always present unless the panel is purely abstract/symbolic
- She carries Kassandra's spirit — she is love made visible in every scene

---

## SACRED COLOR RULES

| Color | Theological Meaning | Correct Use | NEVER Use |
|-------|-------------------|-------------|-----------|
| True Red #8B0000 | Blood of Jesus — the sacrifice that saved Tannie | Nail polish, harness, dress accents, cushions | Pink, coral, candy red, hot red |
| Silver | Refining, purification, cleansing | Cross necklace, harness hardware, rings | Decorative bling, glitter, costume silver |
| Ivory #FFFAEC | Aspiring to be like Jesus — not perfect yet | Warm backgrounds, silk robes, paper textures | Cold white, sterile gray, clinical white |
| Black | Grounding | Ink outlines only | Overwhelming fills or dark moods |

---

## PROHIBITED — Never generate any of the following

- Pink or coral in place of true red (any shade)
- Princess Kay looking angry, mature, ferocious, or wearing pink
- Revealing clothing on Tannie — nothing showing skin
- Cold white or sterile gray backgrounds
- Text, words, watermarks, or labels inside the image
- Costume jewelry on Princess Kay
- Catholic imagery, pentagrams, skulls, or occult symbols
- Anything that could dishonor or diminish Kassandra's memory

---

## TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS

- Style: Comic book illustration, sketchy ink lines, halftone dots
- Orientation: Portrait (9:16) — 1024x1792
- Quality: HD
- Style mode: vivid
- Bottom of image: leave clear space (~15% height) for caption text bar overlay
